stories.author: Judd Legum
stories.title: "Citizens Bank said it plans to wind down its financial relationship with two private prison companies that ha...
stories.text: "Citizens Bank said it plans to wind down its financial relationship with two private prison companies that have been government contractors under the Trump administration to help run immigration detention centers, bowing to public pressure from advocates and left-leaning city governments."

stories.author: Aaron Rupar
stories.title: Brian Tyler Cohen on "The Day After"
stories.text: "There is a hunger for Democrats to not be feckless, not be the party of strongly worded letters."
